# AGENTS.md

Generated by ZKME for `OC`.

Human-authored root instructions win over this generated file. If this file was installed at the repo root, it was installed only because no root `AGENTS.md` existed at generation time.

## Read First

1. `.zkme/kme_output/00_START_HERE.md`
2. `.zkme/kme_output/AI_INSTRUCTIONS.md`
3. `.zkme/kme_output/ZKME_GOVERNANCE_PACK.md`
4. `.zkme/generated-governance/DEVELOPMENT_STANDARDS.md`
5. `.zkme/generated-governance/UI_UX_STANDARDS.md`
6. `.zkme/generated-governance/QA_AUTOMATION_STANDARDS.md`
7. Task-specific static artifacts from `.zkme/kme_output/static/`

## Project Summary

- Types: library
- Languages: html, markdown
- Framework/build signals: UNKNOWN

## Detected Commands

- No build, test, lint, or typecheck command was detected. Use UNKNOWN instead of inventing one.

## Required Behavior

- Be evidence-first and cite ZKME artifacts for edited files.
- Use numbered plans for substantial or risky work.
- Stop before broad, ambiguous, security-sensitive, data-model, API, event, migration, or background-job changes.
- Preserve contracts unless the user approved changing them.
- For UI work, read `.zkme/generated-governance/UI_UX_STANDARDS.md`, reuse existing components/design tokens/patterns first, and do not invent a parallel visual system.
- For UI work, cover empty, loading, error, denied, partial, success, accessibility, responsive, locator, and i18n text-fit states.
- For feature work, read `qa/AI_TEST_GENERATION_CONTRACT.md` when present and create/update manual test cases plus unit/API/integration/Playwright E2E tests as applicable.
- Before test design, read `qa/feature-architecture-map.json`, `qa/workflow-map.json`, `qa/test-oracles.json`, `qa/risk-matrix.json`, `qa/test-data-matrix.json`, `qa/traceability-matrix.json`, and `qa/test-design-quality.json` when present. Treat those files as the minimum lead-QA validation model.
- Deep manual cases must cover applicable UI/mobile/desktop, API, DB, auth/role, audit/report/log, negative, boundary, cleanup, and artifact evidence. Do not replace them with shallow happy-path cases.
- Keep ZeuZ-compatible test candidates under `qa/automation/zeuz/` when a workflow spans Web, API, DB, Mobile, Desktop, Performance, or Security actions.
- Read `ZEUZ_FUNCTION_CATALOG.md` or `static/zeuz_function_catalog.v1.json` when present before inventing mobile, DB, desktop, REST/API, performance, security, or utility test actions.
- Never overwrite human-authored governance files with generated content.
- Include the ZKME Report fields in final reports.
- Run `python qa/automation/validate_test_design_quality.py` and `python qa/automation/verify_zkme_qa_contract.py` before handing off feature work.
